title: OrangePvpTweaks
description: A Fps Boost And PVP Pack This pack will optomize your experience and make your gameplay much better for more cheak GALLERY AND DISCRIPTION
body:
This Pack is made up for orange lovers (COLOUR) This pack will optomize your experience :>

• Key Features 🔑 : 

• Low fire

• Low shield

• Clean orange crystal

• Orange Totem

• Small Totem pop

• Orange Enderpearl

• Orange Enderpearl

• Orange Elytra

• Custom Hotbar 

• Custom Hearts


Things That make it FPS BOOST 🚀 :

• No smoke particles 🚬

• No fire particles 🔥

• No blast Particles 💥

• No screen particles 🙌



                                   I really Hope you enjoy :)
